title: Earlier Mutation-Seam And AI-Boundary Transition History Demotion Execution
objective: Hard-demote the remaining earlier 2026-05-06 Olares Dev Residency mutation-seam closure, AI-workflow boundary, publication-gate closeout, and bridge-defer records so those records no longer read like live next-slice or operator guidance for the standalone repo boundary.
dependency_note: After Packet 187, the smallest remaining earlier 2026-05-06 transition branch runs from mutation-seam closure through the Olares-first AI workflow boundary and its publication/defer closeout. Packets 033 and 034 record the hosted mutation-seam closure, Packets 035 through 038 record the AI workflow reset and minimal-MCP first slice, Packet 039 records the first authority publication gate, Packet 040 records the explicit bridge-defer decision, and Packet 041 records the closeout publication gate. Those records preserve already-closed transition evidence, but their titles and top sections still read like live next-slice or operator guidance instead of historical provenance.
execution_scope: Retitle the nine targeted Olares Dev Residency handoffs as historical transition records and add explicit current-routing blocks.
Retitle the nine targeted Olares Dev Residency packet JSON titles as historical records and add explicit historical-note and current-routing fields.
Preserve the decision, execution, publication, and observed-state evidence as provenance rather than rewriting the historical records wholesale.
forbidden_scope: broad 2026-05-06 archive rewriting beyond top-entry demotion and routing context
Operations Visibility history normalization in the same packet
success_criteria: Each targeted mutation-seam and AI-boundary transition handoff now leads as a historical record instead of live next-slice guidance.
Each targeted packet JSON now carries explicit historical-note and current-routing context instead of reading like a still-live decision, execution, or publication definition.
Repo-owned status routing records the family closure and leaves the Operations Visibility family separate if still untouched.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-033-credentialed-mutation-seam-hosted-repair-and-public-pm-live-data-proof-with-custom-domain-dns-pending-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-034-mutation-seam-custom-domain-dns-closure-and-operations-web-env-realignment-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-035-olares-first-priority-reset-and-ai-workflow-hardening-decision-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-036-ai-workflow-boundary-and-relay-reduction-first-slice-planning-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-037-minimal-mcp-trio-operator-surface-and-ai-boundary-restatement-execution-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-038-host-side-minimal-mcp-trio-operator-adoption-and-relay-reduction-execution-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-039-packet-035-through-packet-038-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-reconciliation-gate-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-040-post-039-ai-queue-bridge-opening-or-defer-decision-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-041-packet-039-and-packet-040-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-reconciliation-gate-handoff.md -Pattern '^# Historical Olares Dev Residency','^Current routing:'
next_action: Execute this packet as the earlier mutation-seam and AI-boundary transition residue slice, and keep Operations Visibility separate.
